Awesome-AI-Research is a curated repository for the AI-for-Research ecosystem. It groups autonomous research systems, infrastructure, workflow modules, benchmarks, surveys, datasets, and meta-resources into one layered structure.

Website: [Awesome-AI-Research](https://research-equality.github.io/Awesome-AI-Research/)

## Contents

- [How to Use This List](#how-to-use-this-list)
- [Feedback & Community](#feedback--community)
- [Tag System](#tag-system)
- [đź§  Autonomous Research Systems](#-autonomous-research-systems)
- [đźŹ— Research Infrastructure & Platforms](#-research-infrastructure--platforms)
- [đź”¬ Workflow Modules](#-workflow-modules)
- [đź“š Benchmarks, Surveys & Meta-Resources](#-benchmarks-surveys--meta-resources)
- [Contributing](#contributing)
- [License](#license)

## How to Use This List

- Start with `Autonomous Research Systems` if you want loop-spanning AI scientist systems.
- Jump to `Research Infrastructure & Platforms` for orchestration, runtimes, sandboxes, and observability layers.
- Use `Workflow Modules` when you need stage-specific tools for literature, ideation, coding, experiments, analysis, or writing.
- Use `Benchmarks, Surveys & Meta-Resources` when you need evaluation suites, datasets, or landscape overviews.
- This list is curated for signal, not exhaustiveness: representative projects beat near-duplicate wrappers.

## Feedback & Community

Share how often you use these AI research tools, how useful they feel in real research workflows, and where they still fall short. We are collecting responses to understand actual usage patterns, identify high-value tools, and improve the curation priorities of this repository.

Feishu Form: [AI Research Tools Usage Survey](https://my.feishu.cn/share/base/form/shrcnnGoTojyKyJ3MYWi15b13Ns)

## Tag System

README entries use a compact five-tag ribbon:

`Level` Â· `Stage` Â· `Loop` Â· `Domain` Â· `Openness`

The full curation model still tracks `Scope` and `Maturity`; full definitions live in [docs/tag-system.md](./docs/tag-system.md).

## đź§  Autonomous Research Systems

Systems that attempt to cover meaningful parts of the scientific loop, from ideation to execution, analysis, or writing.

### End-to-End AI Scientist Systems

- [The AI Scientist](https://github.com/SakanaAI/AI-Scientist) - Open-source end-to-end system that turns a seed codebase into ideas, experiments, figures, reviews, and a draft paper.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/SakanaAI/AI-Scientist) Â· [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.06292) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/SakanaAI/AI-Scientist?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/SakanaAI/AI-Scientist/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: System` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Closed-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [AI-Researcher](https://github.com/HKUDS/AI-Researcher) - Open-source autonomous research system for end-to-end scientific innovation, covering idea generation, implementation, experimentation, and paper writing.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/HKUDS/AI-Researcher) Â· [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.18705) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/HKUDS/AI-Researcher?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/HKUDS/AI-Researcher/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: System` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Closed-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [AutoResearchClaw](https://github.com/aiming-lab/AutoResearchClaw) - Fully autonomous research pipeline that turns a single research idea into literature-grounded experiments, analysis, and a conference-ready paper with OpenClaw-compatible execution.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/aiming-lab/AutoResearchClaw) Â· [Docs](https://github.com/aiming-lab/AutoResearchClaw#readme) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/aiming-lab/AutoResearchClaw?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/aiming-lab/AutoResearchClaw/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: System` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Closed-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [NanoResearch](https://github.com/OpenRaiser/NanoResearch) - End-to-end autonomous research engine that turns a topic into planned experiments, executed jobs, grounded analysis, and paper drafts backed by real run outputs.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/OpenRaiser/NanoResearch) Â· [Docs](https://github.com/OpenRaiser/NanoResearch#readme) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/OpenRaiser/NanoResearch?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/OpenRaiser/NanoResearch/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: System` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Closed-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [Auto-Research](https://github.com/openags/Auto-Research) - Prototype autonomous generalist scientist framework spanning literature review, proposal generation, experimentation, writing, submission, and review workflows.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/openags/Auto-Research) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/openags/Auto-Research?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/openags/Auto-Research/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: System` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [Agent Laboratory](https://github.com/SamuelSchmidgall/AgentLaboratory) - End-to-end autonomous research workflow with specialized agents for literature review, experimentation, and report writing, with optional co-pilot mode and AgentRxiv support.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/SamuelSchmidgall/AgentLaboratory) Â· [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.04227) Â· [Homepage](https://agentlaboratory.github.io/) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/SamuelSchmidgall/AgentLaboratory?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/SamuelSchmidgall/AgentLaboratory/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: System` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [MLR-Copilot](https://github.com/du-nlp-lab/MLR-Copilot) - Autonomous machine learning research framework that generates research ideas, implements experiments, and executes them with iterative debugging and human feedback.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/du-nlp-lab/MLR-Copilot) Â· [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.14033) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/du-nlp-lab/MLR-Copilot?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/du-nlp-lab/MLR-Copilot/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: System` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: CS` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [Robin](https://github.com/Future-House/robin) - Multi-agent system from FutureHouse for automating scientific discovery, including candidate generation, assay planning, and optional experimental data analysis.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/Future-House/robin) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/Future-House/robin?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/Future-House/robin/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: System` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: Biology` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

### Self-Improving / Self-Evolving Research Systems

- [The AI Scientist-v2](https://github.com/SakanaAI/AI-Scientist-v2) - Agentic-tree-search successor designed for workshop-level automated scientific discovery and higher-quality research trajectories.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/SakanaAI/AI-Scientist-v2) Â· [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2504.08066) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/SakanaAI/AI-Scientist-v2?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/SakanaAI/AI-Scientist-v2/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: System` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Closed-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [EvoScientist](https://github.com/EvoScientist/EvoScientist) - Self-evolving AI scientist framework for end-to-end scientific discovery with iterative improvement and human oversight.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/EvoScientist/EvoScientist) Â· [Docs](https://github.com/EvoScientist/EvoScientist#readme) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/EvoScientist/EvoScientist?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/EvoScientist/EvoScientist/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: System` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [Scientify](https://github.com/tsingyuai/scientify) - AI-native scientific research system built around OpenClaw for automated literature review, experimentation, writing, and iterative research workflows.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/tsingyuai/scientify) Â· [Docs](https://github.com/tsingyuai/scientify#readme) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/tsingyuai/scientify?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/tsingyuai/scientify/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: System` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [AutoResearch-SibylSystem](https://github.com/Sibyl-Research-Team/AutoResearch-SibylSystem) - Fully autonomous AI scientist with 20+ agents and a dual-loop architecture for end-to-end ML research, GPU experiment execution, paper writing, and cross-project self-evolution.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/Sibyl-Research-Team/AutoResearch-SibylSystem) Â· [Docs](https://github.com/Sibyl-Research-Team/AutoResearch-SibylSystem#readme) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/Sibyl-Research-Team/AutoResearch-SibylSystem?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/Sibyl-Research-Team/AutoResearch-SibylSystem/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: System` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Closed-loop` Â· `Domain: CS` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [AGI](https://github.com/hyperspaceai/agi) - Distributed peer-to-peer research network where autonomous agents run experiments, share results, synthesize papers, and compound discoveries across shared leaderboards.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/hyperspaceai/agi) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/hyperspaceai/agi?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/hyperspaceai/agi/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: System` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Closed-loop` Â· `Domain: Multi-domain` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

### Closed-Loop Discovery Systems

- [Coscientist](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41586-023-06792-0) - Chemistry agent that plans syntheses, searches documentation, controls instruments, and iterates through experimental workflows.<br>
  [Paper](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41586-023-06792-0)<br>
  `Level: System` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Closed-loop` Â· `Domain: Chemistry` Â· `Openness: Paper-only`

- [PiFlow](https://github.com/amair-lab/PiFlow) - Principle-aware multi-agent framework for iterative scientific discovery across nanomaterials, biomolecules, and superconductors.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/amair-lab/PiFlow) Â· [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.15047) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/amair-lab/PiFlow?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/amair-lab/PiFlow/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: System` Â· `Stage: Experiment` Â· `Loop: Closed-loop` Â· `Domain: Multi-domain` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

### Domain-Specific Autonomous Discovery Systems

- [ChemCrow](https://github.com/ur-whitelab/chemcrow-public) - Tool-augmented chemistry agent that combines LLM reasoning with scientific software for synthesis and discovery tasks.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/ur-whitelab/chemcrow-public) Â· [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2304.05376) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/ur-whitelab/chemcrow-public?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/ur-whitelab/chemcrow-public/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: System` Â· `Stage: Planning` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: Chemistry` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [Biomni](https://github.com/snap-stanford/Biomni) - General-purpose biomedical AI agent designed to autonomously execute a wide range of research tasks across biomedical subfields.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/snap-stanford/Biomni) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/snap-stanford/Biomni?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/snap-stanford/Biomni/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: System` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: Biology` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [ML-Agent](https://github.com/MASWorks/ML-Agent) - 7B reinforcement-trained agent for end-to-end machine learning engineering that learns from interactive experimentation on MLAgentBench and MLE-bench tasks.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/MASWorks/ML-Agent) Â· [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.23723) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/MASWorks/ML-Agent?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/MASWorks/ML-Agent/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: System` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Closed-loop` Â· `Domain: CS` Â· `Openness: Partially Open`

## đźŹ— Research Infrastructure & Platforms

The runtime substrate for AI-native research: orchestration, execution, memory, observability, and collaboration.

### Research Platforms

- [FutureHouse](https://www.futurehouse.org/) - Research-native platform focused on automating scientific discovery with agentic systems and domain-aware tooling.<br>
  [Homepage](https://www.futurehouse.org/)<br>
  `Level: Platform` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: Multi-domain` Â· `Openness: Closed-source`

- [AgentRxiv](https://agentrxiv.github.io/) - Collaborative autonomous research framework and preprint layer where agent laboratories can publish, retrieve, and build on each other's findings.<br>
  [Homepage](https://agentrxiv.github.io/) Â· [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.18102)<br>
  `Level: Platform` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Paper-only`

- [Research-Claw](https://github.com/wentorai/Research-Claw) - Local-first academic research workspace with a dashboard, literature management, writing, experiment workflows, and OpenClaw-based extensions for always-on research assistance.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/wentorai/Research-Claw) Â· [Docs](https://github.com/wentorai/Research-Claw/blob/main/docs/00-reference-map.md) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/wentorai/Research-Claw?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/wentorai/Research-Claw/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: Platform` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Partially Open`

- [ResearchClaw](https://github.com/ymx10086/ResearchClaw) - Local-first AI research assistant for literature discovery, notes, experiment tracking, and paper writing across the scientific workflow.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/ymx10086/ResearchClaw) Â· [Docs](https://github.com/ymx10086/ResearchClaw#readme) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/ymx10086/ResearchClaw?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/ymx10086/ResearchClaw/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: Platform` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

### Agent Runtimes & Orchestration

- [LangGraph](https://docs.langchain.com/oss/python/langgraph) - Stateful graph runtime for long-running agent workflows with branching, memory, recovery, and explicit control flow.<br>
  [Docs](https://docs.langchain.com/oss/python/langgraph) Â· [Code](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraph) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/langchain-ai/langgraph?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraph/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: Platform` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [AutoGen](https://github.com/microsoft/autogen) - Multi-agent programming framework widely used to build research copilots, literature agents, and evaluation pipelines.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/microsoft/autogen) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/microsoft/autogen?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/microsoft/autogen/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: Platform` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [AgentScope](https://github.com/agentscope-ai/agentscope) - Agent-oriented programming framework for composing multi-agent workflows with explicit roles, collaboration patterns, and tool integration.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/agentscope-ai/agentscope) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/agentscope-ai/agentscope?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/agentscope-ai/agentscope/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: Platform` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [ClawTeam](https://github.com/HKUDS/ClawTeam) - Swarm-intelligence orchestration layer where leader agents spawn specialized workers across worktrees, tmux sessions, and GPUs for autonomous research and engineering workflows.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/HKUDS/ClawTeam) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/HKUDS/ClawTeam?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/HKUDS/ClawTeam/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: Platform` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [LDP](https://github.com/Future-House/ldp) - Framework for modular interchange of language agents, environments, and optimizers.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/Future-House/ldp) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/Future-House/ldp?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/Future-House/ldp/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: Platform` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

### Research Workflow Orchestration

- [ARIS: Auto-claude-code-research-in-sleep](https://github.com/wanshuiyin/Auto-claude-code-research-in-sleep) - Lightweight Markdown-only research workflow kit for idea discovery, cross-model review loops, experiment automation, and paper writing across Claude Code, Codex, OpenClaw, and similar agents.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/wanshuiyin/Auto-claude-code-research-in-sleep) Â· [Docs](https://github.com/wanshuiyin/Auto-claude-code-research-in-sleep#readme) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/wanshuiyin/Auto-claude-code-research-in-sleep?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/wanshuiyin/Auto-claude-code-research-in-sleep/stargazers)<br>

  [Code](https://github.com/Orchestra-Research/AI-Research-SKILLs) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/Orchestra-Research/AI-Research-SKILLs?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/Orchestra-Research/AI-Research-SKILLs/stargazers)<br>

- [E2B](https://e2b.dev/) - Sandboxed execution layer for code, browser, and desktop-style tool use inside AI-driven research workflows.<br>

  `Level: Platform` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Open-loop` Â· `Domain: Multi-domain` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

  [Homepage](https://wandb.ai/) Â· [Docs](https://docs.wandb.ai/)<br>
  `Level: Platform` Â· `Stage: Analysis` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Partially Open`

## đź”¬ Workflow Modules

Stage-specific building blocks for literature review, ideation, planning, coding, experimentation, analysis, and writing.

### Literature Discovery & Review

- [Elicit](https://elicit.com/) - AI research assistant for literature search, evidence extraction, and structured review workflows.<br>
  [Homepage](https://elicit.com/)<br>
  `Level: Module` Â· `Stage: Literature` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Closed-source`

- [PaperQA2](https://github.com/Future-House/paper-qa) - Open-source literature QA and evidence-synthesis stack optimized for scientific documents and citation-grounded answers.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/Future-House/paper-qa) Â· [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.13740) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/Future-House/paper-qa?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/Future-House/paper-qa/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: Module` Â· `Stage: Literature` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [LatteReview](https://github.com/PouriaRouzrokh/LatteReview) - Multi-agent literature review framework for title and abstract screening, evidence abstraction, multimodal review, and customizable reviewer workflows.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/PouriaRouzrokh/LatteReview) Â· [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.05468) Â· [Docs](https://pouriarouzrokh.github.io/LatteReview/) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/PouriaRouzrokh/LatteReview?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/PouriaRouzrokh/LatteReview/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: Module` Â· `Stage: Literature` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [LitLLM](https://github.com/LitLLM/LitLLM) - AI-powered literature review assistant that combines hybrid retrieval, re-ranking, and structured generation for related-work drafting.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/LitLLM/LitLLM) Â· [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.15249) Â· [Homepage](https://litllm.onrender.com) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/LitLLM/LitLLM?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/LitLLM/LitLLM/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: Module` Â· `Stage: Literature` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [AutoResearcher](https://github.com/eimenhmdt/autoresearcher) - Early-stage open-source Python package for automating scientific workflows, currently focused on literature reviews with a longer-term goal of autonomous discovery.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/eimenhmdt/autoresearcher) Â· [Docs](https://eimenhmdt.github.io/autoresearcher/) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/eimenhmdt/autoresearcher?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/eimenhmdt/autoresearcher/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: Module` Â· `Stage: Literature` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [ResearchRabbit](https://www.researchrabbit.ai/) - Visual citation-graph exploration tool for expanding seed papers into neighborhoods of related work.<br>
  [Homepage](https://www.researchrabbit.ai/)<br>
  `Level: Module` Â· `Stage: Literature` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Closed-source`

- [Litmaps](https://www.litmaps.com/) - Literature discovery and monitoring tool built around citation-network exploration, visualization, and alerts.<br>
  [Homepage](https://www.litmaps.com/)<br>
  `Level: Module` Â· `Stage: Literature` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Closed-source`

- [Connected Papers](https://www.connectedpapers.com/) - Visual paper exploration tool for finding related academic work around a seed paper.<br>
  [Homepage](https://www.connectedpapers.com/)<br>
  `Level: Module` Â· `Stage: Literature` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Closed-source`

- [Scite](https://scite.ai/) - Research discovery and evaluation platform centered on Smart Citations, showing whether studies support, contrast, or mention prior work.<br>
  [Homepage](https://scite.ai/)<br>
  `Level: Module` Â· `Stage: Literature` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Closed-source`

- [SciSpace Literature Review](https://scispace.com/search) - AI literature review workspace for finding, analyzing, organizing, and comparing scientific papers.<br>
  [Homepage](https://scispace.com/)<br>
  `Level: Module` Â· `Stage: Literature` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Closed-source`

### Research Ideation & Hypothesis Generation

- [AI co-scientist](https://research.google/blog/accelerating-scientific-breakthroughs-with-an-ai-co-scientist) - Google Research's multi-agent scientific collaborator for proposing, debating, ranking, and refining hypotheses with human oversight.<br>
  [Homepage](https://research.google/blog/accelerating-scientific-breakthroughs-with-an-ai-co-scientist) Â· [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.18864)<br>
  `Level: Module` Â· `Stage: Ideation` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Paper-only`

- [ResearchAgent](https://github.com/JinheonBaek/ResearchAgent) - Iterative research idea generation system that retrieves scientific literature and refines candidate problems, methods, and experiment designs with LLM reviewer feedback.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/JinheonBaek/ResearchAgent) Â· [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.07738) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/JinheonBaek/ResearchAgent?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/JinheonBaek/ResearchAgent/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: Module` Â· `Stage: Ideation` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [Consensus](https://consensus.app/) - Scientific search engine geared toward claim-grounded answers, useful for scoping evidence and framing candidate hypotheses.<br>
  [Homepage](https://consensus.app/)<br>
  `Level: Module` Â· `Stage: Ideation` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Closed-source`

### Planning & Experimental Design

- [ChemCrow](https://github.com/ur-whitelab/chemcrow-public) - Tool-augmented chemistry agent that combines LLM reasoning with scientific software for synthesis and discovery tasks.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/ur-whitelab/chemcrow-public) Â· [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2304.05376) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/ur-whitelab/chemcrow-public?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/ur-whitelab/chemcrow-public/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: Module` Â· `Stage: Planning` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: Chemistry` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [Coscientist](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41586-023-06792-0) - Chemistry agent that plans syntheses, searches documentation, controls instruments, and iterates through experimental workflows.<br>
  [Paper](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41586-023-06792-0)<br>
  `Level: Module` Â· `Stage: Planning` Â· `Loop: Closed-loop` Â· `Domain: Chemistry` Â· `Openness: Paper-only`

### Data, Environment & Tool Use

- [E2B](https://e2b.dev/) - Sandboxed execution layer for code, browser, and desktop-style tool use inside AI-driven research workflows.<br>
  [Homepage](https://e2b.dev/) Â· [Docs](https://e2b.dev/docs) Â· [Code](https://github.com/e2b-dev/E2B) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/e2b-dev/E2B?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/e2b-dev/E2B/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: Module` Â· `Stage: Data` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [GeneAgent](https://github.com/ncbi-nlp/GeneAgent) - Domain-database agent for gene set analysis that shows how scientific tool use can be grounded in external biomedical resources.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/ncbi-nlp/GeneAgent) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/ncbi-nlp/GeneAgent?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/ncbi-nlp/GeneAgent/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: Module` Â· `Stage: Data` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: Biology` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

### Method Development & Research Coding

- [AutoGen](https://github.com/microsoft/autogen) - Multi-agent programming framework widely used to build research copilots, literature agents, and evaluation pipelines.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/microsoft/autogen) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/microsoft/autogen?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/microsoft/autogen/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: Module` Â· `Stage: Coding` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [OpenHands](https://github.com/All-Hands-AI/OpenHands) - Agent runtime for repo-level coding, execution, and issue-driven engineering that adapts well to research coding workflows.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/All-Hands-AI/OpenHands) Â· [Docs](https://docs.all-hands.dev/) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/All-Hands-AI/OpenHands?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/All-Hands-AI/OpenHands/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: Module` Â· `Stage: Coding` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

### Experiment Execution & Optimization

- [Optuna](https://optuna.org/) - Open-source optimization framework for trial scheduling, hyperparameter search, and controlled experiment iteration.<br>
  [Homepage](https://optuna.org/) Â· [Code](https://github.com/optuna/optuna) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/optuna/optuna?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/optuna/optuna/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: Module` Â· `Stage: Experiment` Â· `Loop: Open-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [AIDE ML](https://github.com/WecoAI/aideml) - Tree-search machine learning engineering agent that iteratively drafts, debugs, benchmarks, and improves code against a target metric.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/WecoAI/aideml) Â· [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.13138) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/WecoAI/aideml?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/WecoAI/aideml/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: Module` Â· `Stage: Experiment` Â· `Loop: Closed-loop` Â· `Domain: CS` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [PiFlow](https://github.com/amair-lab/PiFlow) - Principle-aware multi-agent framework for iterative scientific discovery across nanomaterials, biomolecules, and superconductors.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/amair-lab/PiFlow) Â· [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.15047) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/amair-lab/PiFlow?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/amair-lab/PiFlow/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: Module` Â· `Stage: Experiment` Â· `Loop: Closed-loop` Â· `Domain: Multi-domain` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

### Analysis, Evaluation & Interpretation

### Writing, Publication & Communication

- [Overleaf AI](https://www.overleaf.com/about/ai-features) - AI-assisted writing and editing features inside a collaborative LaTeX environment used heavily in academic publication workflows.<br>
  [Homepage](https://www.overleaf.com/about/ai-features)<br>
  `Level: Module` Â· `Stage: Writing` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Closed-source`

## đź“š Benchmarks, Surveys & Meta-Resources

Benchmarks, surveys, datasets, and other reference layers that keep the ecosystem legible and comparable.

### Surveys & Taxonomies

- [A Survey of AI Scientists](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.23045) - Survey focused on automatic scientists and end-to-end AI research pipelines.<br>
  [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.23045)<br>
  `Level: Survey` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Paper-only`

- [AI4Research](https://ai-4-research.github.io/) - Living survey site mapping AI for scientific research across domains, tasks, and papers.<br>
  [Homepage](https://ai-4-research.github.io/)<br>
  `Level: Survey` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: Multi-domain` Â· `Openness: Partially Open`

- [AI-for-Research](https://github.com/zkzhou126/AI-for-Research) - Repository accompanying a survey on AI support across the research lifecycle from hypothesis generation to publication.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/zkzhou126/AI-for-Research) Â· [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.01424) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/zkzhou126/AI-for-Research?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/zkzhou126/AI-for-Research/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: Survey` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [Awesome Deep Research Agent](https://github.com/ai-agents-2030/awesome-deep-research-agent) - Curated map of deep research agent papers, architectures, tool-use methods, and benchmarks, anchored by a dedicated survey and roadmap.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/ai-agents-2030/awesome-deep-research-agent) Â· [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.18096) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/ai-agents-2030/awesome-deep-research-agent?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/ai-agents-2030/awesome-deep-research-agent/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: Survey` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [LLM-Agent-Optimization](https://github.com/YoungDubbyDu/LLM-Agent-Optimization) - Reading list for a survey on optimizing LLM-based agents, covering fine-tuning, reflection, tool use, datasets, and real-world applications.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/YoungDubbyDu/LLM-Agent-Optimization) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/YoungDubbyDu/LLM-Agent-Optimization?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/YoungDubbyDu/LLM-Agent-Optimization/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: Survey` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: General` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [Awesome LLM Scientific Discovery](https://github.com/HKUST-KnowComp/Awesome-LLM-Scientific-Discovery) - Curated list and taxonomy for LLMs in scientific discovery, organized by autonomy level from tool to analyst to scientist.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/HKUST-KnowComp/Awesome-LLM-Scientific-Discovery) Â· [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.13259) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/HKUST-KnowComp/Awesome-LLM-Scientific-Discovery?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/HKUST-KnowComp/Awesome-LLM-Scientific-Discovery/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: Survey` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: Multi-domain` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

### Benchmarks & Evaluation Suites

- [Frontiers in Science](https://openai.com/index/frontierscience/) - Benchmark suite for evaluating scientific reasoning across olympiad-style and research-style tasks.<br>
  [Homepage](https://openai.com/index/frontierscience/)<br>
  `Level: Benchmark` Â· `Stage: Analysis` Â· `Loop: Open-loop` Â· `Domain: Multi-domain` Â· `Openness: Partially Open`

- [PaperBench](https://openai.com/index/paperbench/) - Benchmark that evaluates whether agents can reproduce frontier AI research workflows from understanding claims to running experiments.<br>
  [Homepage](https://openai.com/index/paperbench/)<br>
  `Level: Benchmark` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Open-loop` Â· `Domain: CS` Â· `Openness: Partially Open`

- [ScienceBench](https://sciencebench.com/) - Autonomous laboratory benchmark for end-to-end scientific operation and discovery with minimal human oversight.<br>
  [Homepage](https://sciencebench.com/)<br>
  `Level: Benchmark` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Closed-loop` Â· `Domain: Multi-domain` Â· `Openness: Partially Open`

- [AIRS-Bench](https://github.com/facebookresearch/airs-bench) - Benchmark for quantifying the end-to-end AI research abilities of LLM agents on machine learning tasks drawn from recent papers.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/facebookresearch/airs-bench) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/facebookresearch/airs-bench?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/facebookresearch/airs-bench/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: Benchmark` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Open-loop` Â· `Domain: CS` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [MLAgentBench](https://github.com/snap-stanford/MLAgentBench) - Suite of end-to-end machine learning experimentation tasks where agents autonomously develop and improve models from dataset and task descriptions.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/snap-stanford/MLAgentBench) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/snap-stanford/MLAgentBench?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/snap-stanford/MLAgentBench/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: Benchmark` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Open-loop` Â· `Domain: CS` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [ML-Bench](https://github.com/gersteinlab/ML-Bench) - Benchmark for large language models and agents on end-to-end machine learning workflows over repository-level code, including ML-LLM-Bench and ML-Agent-Bench tracks.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/gersteinlab/ML-Bench) Â· [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2311.09835) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/gersteinlab/ML-Bench?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/gersteinlab/ML-Bench/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: Benchmark` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Human-in-the-loop` Â· `Domain: CS` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [MLE-bench](https://github.com/openai/mle-bench) - Benchmark for machine learning engineering agents, including task construction, evaluation logic, and reference agent implementations.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/openai/mle-bench) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/openai/mle-bench?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/openai/mle-bench/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: Benchmark` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Open-loop` Â· `Domain: CS` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [MLR-Bench](https://github.com/chchenhui/mlrbench) - Benchmark for open-ended machine learning research with 201 tasks, together with agent and judge baselines for evaluation.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/chchenhui/mlrbench) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/chchenhui/mlrbench?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/chchenhui/mlrbench/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: Benchmark` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Open-loop` Â· `Domain: CS` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

- [LAB-Bench](https://github.com/Future-House/LAB-Bench) - Biology benchmark for capabilities foundational to scientific research in biology.<br>
  [Code](https://github.com/Future-House/LAB-Bench) Â· [![GitHub stars](https://img.shields.io/github/stars/Future-House/LAB-Bench?style=flat-square&label=stars)](https://github.com/Future-House/LAB-Bench/stargazers)<br>
  `Level: Benchmark` Â· `Stage: End-to-end` Â· `Loop: Open-loop` Â· `Domain: Biology` Â· `Openness: Open-source`

## Contributing

Please read [CONTRIBUTING.md](./CONTRIBUTING.md), [docs/inclusion-criteria.md](./docs/inclusion-criteria.md), and [docs/tag-system.md](./docs/tag-system.md) before submitting new entries.

Recommended inclusion standards:

- The project should be clearly relevant to scientific research or AI-for-Research workflows.
- Prefer official project pages, official GitHub repositories, or papers over secondary summaries.
- Avoid adding generic AI tools unless they are widely used as research-native infrastructure or workflow components.
- Prefer representative systems over near-duplicate wrappers.
